chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1595 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.6542/2022 3. For hearing of main case 12-12-2023 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned APG submits that vide order dated 13.10.2023 learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-III, Khairpur has disposed of the case under ‘C’ class and approved summary, hence grievances of the petitioners have been redressed. Accordingly this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
